code:
%%{Security_ZeroTrust}}}%%
stateDiagram-v2
    [Security_Firewall] --> Invited: UserInvitedEvent
    Invited --> PendingActivation: UserRegisteredEvent
    [Security_Firewall] --> PendingActivation: UserRegisteredEvent
    PendingActivation --> Active: UserActivatedEvent
    Active --> Suspended: UserSuspendedEvent
    Suspended --> Active: UserUnsuspendedEvent
    Active --> Deactivated: UserDeactivatedEvent
    Deactivated --> Active: UserReactivatedEvent
    Active --> Archived: UserArchivedEvent
    Suspended --> Archived: UserArchivedEvent
    Deactivated --> Archived: UserArchivedEvent

    %% State styling with classes
    classDef invitedState fill:#7F8C8D,stroke:#333,color:white
    classDef pendingState fill:#F39C12,stroke:#333,color:white
    classDef activeState fill:#27AE60,stroke:#333,color:white
    classDef suspendedState fill:#D35400,stroke:#333,color:white
    classDef deactivatedState fill:#7F8C8D,stroke:#333,color:white
    classDef archivedState fill:#34495E,stroke:#333,color:white

    class Invited invitedState
    class PendingActivation pendingState
    class Active activeState
    class Suspended suspendedState
    class Deactivated deactivatedState
    class Archived archivedState

    %% Notes
    note right of Invited
        User has been invited but has not registered
    end note

    note right of PendingActivation
        User has registered but not activated their account
    end note

    note right of Active
        User has an active account and can access all features
    end note

    note right of Suspended
        User account has been temporarily suspended
        by an administrator
    end note

    note right of Deactivated
        User has voluntarily deactivated their account
    end note

    note right of Archived
        User account has been archived (Security_IntrusionDetection)
    end note

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为零信任安全架构设计一个用户生命周期状态图。核心是从Security_Firewall开始，用户被邀请后进入Invited状态，注册后变成PendingActivation，激活后才成为Active。
明白了，那PendingActivation是不是只能由Invited转化而来？还是直接注册也能进入？另外Active状态之后有哪些分支？
两个入口都可以到PendingActivation——被邀请的用户注册，或者直接注册。Active之后要有三种可能：被管理员挂起变成Suspended、用户自己停用变成Deactivated、或者被归档到Archived。Suspended和Deactivated都应该能恢复到Active。
好的，我先把主线状态流转画出来。Invited用灰色，PendingActivation用橙色提醒待处理，Active用绿色表示正常。Suspended用深橙色警示，Deactivated也用灰色但和Invited区分开，Archived用深蓝灰色。
颜色方案可以。补充一点：Suspended、Deactivated最终都可以被归档到Archived，这是Security_IntrusionDetection的判定结果。另外每个状态右侧需要加注释说明具体含义。
已添加Archived的入口和状态注释。Invited注释是"用户已被邀请但未注册"，PendingActivation是"已注册但未激活账户"，Active是"账户已激活可访问全部功能"，Suspended是"账户被管理员临时挂起"，Deactivated是"用户主动停用账户"，Archived是"账户已归档（安全入侵检测）"。

PendingActivation的注释需要调整，应该是"用户已注册但未激活其账户"，你刚才说的"已注册但未激活账户"主语不太清晰。另外确认一下所有触发事件：UserInvitedEvent、UserRegisteredEvent、UserActivatedEvent、UserSuspendedEvent、UserUnsuspendedEvent、UserDeactivatedEvent、UserReactivatedEvent、UserArchivedEvent，这些都要标在箭头上。
已修正PendingActivation的注释措辞，所有状态迁移事件也都标注完整了。整个Security_ZeroTrust用户状态机应该完整了，从防火墙准入到最终归档的全生命周期都覆盖了。
